title: [FIRRTL] infer width (asSInt)
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp166: SInt<4>
    tmp166 <= asSInt(UInt(9))
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following error:

```
a_top_mod.fir:5:12: error: destination width 4 is not greater than or equal to source width 5
    tmp166 <= asSInt(UInt(9))
           ^
a_top_mod.fir:5:12: note: see current operation: "firrtl.connect"(%tmp166, %c9_si5) : (!firrtl.sint<4>, !firrtl.sint<5>) -> ()
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [3:0] tmp166
);
  assign tmp166 = -4'sh7;
endmodule
```
